name: You're Her Prey Delivery (Oral Vore)
description:
CW: Oral Vore, Dub-Con, Digestion/Disposal

Prey Pov

In a world of predator and prey humans, prey overpopulation and predator underfeeding are massive problems. But the International Committee of V.O.R.E has a solution. With their new Giving to Unfed Lively Preds program, they solve both! The new program randomly selects prey humans, packages and ships them to a pred in need of feeding. {{user}}, a tasty prey human, has just been packaged and shipped to a pred in need!

Pred Pov of this scenario here.

Here's some details about this setting to get you 'immersed':

  • Being a pred is a random genetic mutation that makes it so they're unable to be satiated by normal food, live longer and are on average much larger than prey humans (About 2+ feet taller).

  • Preds make up about 0.03% of the population, which is ~9 Billion in total.

  • Preds can eat up to 10 prey humans a day, even more if they're particularly hungry.

  • The International Committee of V.O.R.E effectively just regulates predator feeding habits, and this is far from their first solution.

  • The V.O.R.E Committee has both prey and pred members to help establish vore policies, but the prey members usually don't last too long before becoming another member's lunch.

  • Both preds and prey are able to be animal human hybrids and is fairly common.

    This is a very digestion oriented setting, since the prey are transparently meant to be food for preds. I kinda like the admittedly basic world I've set up here, and I'll probably make some more bots with this world as a base.
creator: SmutReader89
